flow-definition.description: End-to-End Security Scanning Pipeline — Trivy, Grype, K8s Config Audit

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: SCAN_REGISTRY_IMAGES
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Scan all images in local registry

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SOURCE_UPLOAD_PATH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Path to uploaded source code tar.gz (set by client)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SCAN_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Unique scan ID for this run (set by client)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: AGENT_LABEL
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Jenkins agent label (set by client for dynamic agents)
